name: Barley Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tops and stems off the peppers. Clean out the seeds and inside ribs.
2. Chop onion into coarse cubes.
3. Cook barley according to box instructions.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add peppers for about 2-3 minutes, or until crisp-tender (not soft).
6. Stir fry onions, garlic, and spices over medium heat for about 7 minutes.
7. Grate the cheddar cheese.
8. Stir in barley, grated cheddar cheese, and tomato sauce; mix well and remove from heat.
9. Place peppers in an 8-inch glass pie dish. Fill peppers with mixture, cover with foil, and bake in oven for 25-30 minutes.
